commands.review_summary:
The PR updates label color constants and prefix defaults in `scripts/sync-openclaw-label-colors.mjs` and `scripts/sync-labels.ts`, including exact rating-label colors and softer taxonomy/proof/size colors.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is an administrative label-palette change, not a reported runtime bug. The review path is static script inspection plus label-policy validation.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review of an admin label-policy change with proof override.

target.title: chore(labels): cool label palette
target.body:
## Summary

- revise the OpenClaw label color policy toward a cooler gray/steel palette
- add exact rating-label colors so PR readiness labels no longer keep the brighter purple/red/yellow scheme
- soften taxonomy labels so `agents`, `codex`, `extensions:*`, and `plugin:*` read closer to outline-style metadata
- keep high-severity priority and impact labels saturated while muting routine taxonomy, proof, size, triage, and resolution labels

## Validation

- `node --check scripts/sync-openclaw-label-colors.mjs`
- `node --experimental-strip-types --check scripts/sync-labels.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check scripts/sync-openclaw-label-colors.mjs scripts/sync-labels.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint scripts/sync-openclaw-label-colors.mjs scripts/sync-labels.ts --deny-warnings`
- `git diff --check`

## Live application

- Applied the revised policy to `openclaw/openclaw` live labels.
- Latest apply changed 104 labels: 78 `extensions:*`, 7 `plugin:*`, 3 proof, 4 resolution, 10 triage-candidate, plus `agents` and `codex`.
- Follow-up verification reports no label color changes needed.
